info.name: Stockwise API
info.description: Postman collection for Stockwise inventory management system. Includes JWT auth, lot-based inventory, FIFO sales, and financial dashboards.

query.description: Optional filter by name, SKU, or unit

item.name: Stock Movements
item.description: Read-only endpoints for stock movements. Supports filtering by product, stock, sales order item, and date range.

item.name: Orders
item.description: Manage purchase orders and lifecycle actions

item.name: Items
item.description: Manage items of purchase orders (draft only)

item.name: Sales
Orders
item.description: Manage sales orders (draft, confirmed, fulfilled, cancelled)
Endpoints for Sales Orders and Sales Order Items with FIFO stock deduction

item.name: Financials

query.description: Number of top products to return

item.description: Endpoints for the Financials app: summary, product-level, timeline, and top products by profit.
